name: Misheard
ability: Each day, you must nominate an alive player. Players you nominate might register as evil & as a Minion or Demon, until your next nomination.
flavor: No, no, you must've misheard me; I said she was ready to "celebrate", not "be celibate". No, yet again, you've misheard me; I said I "billed" him, not "killed" him! (v1.0)
